wiki.summary: “Taxes” is the lead single from Geese’s 3rd official studio album Getting Killed. The single features a character plagued with guilt, perhaps from a failed relationship, who decides to turn inward and reject the world around them while they either (depending on your reading of the lyrics) wallow in their pity or work towards improving themselves. Read more on Last.fm.
